steps.title: Identify the indirect question structure
steps.content: The phrase “asked Marta Acosta... what” indicates this is an indirect question—a question embedded in a statement—rather than a direct question in quotes. This distinction determines both the word order and punctuation.

steps.title: Apply the indirect question rule
steps.content: Indirect questions use statement word order and end with a period. Choice B uses statement word order (“her favorite book was”) with a period, which is correct. The other choices use question word order or question punctuation, both of which are incorrect for an indirect question. That matches choice B — B is correct.
